series_metadata.series_description: Meat inspectors place reject tags on facilities or equipment, for example, equipment must be re-washed or repaired. Inspectors place retai (Hold) tags on food products that need further evaluation to determine if they meet Dept. of Agriculture standards.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep for 3 years or until the problem has been resolved then dispose of as wastepaper., Paper: Wastepaper
